nodes.label: AI as research and ideation tool
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI for purely for research, ideation and editing recorded audio

nodes.label: AI as editing assistant
nodes.grounding_span: My audio editing software does have AI features which does help smooth out the AI process, but I will often have to double check their work

nodes.label: Human creative control and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: I am 100% driving the creative decisions

nodes.label: AI as supplement to human work
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement of human work
nodes.grounding_span: It is very important to me that AI is only a supplement to my work, never a replacement

nodes.label: AI voice quality and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: Synthesized voices are on the rise and with their rising quality

nodes.label: Creative authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: maintain my integrity as an actor

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: The greatest conveniences have been during editing where the AI can do work that would have taken me a fair bit of time

nodes.label: Human employment and opportunity
nodes.grounding_span: lessening opportunities for many voice actors

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI as research tool
nodes.grounding_span: It just truly felt like the AI was simply a better search engine

nodes.label: Cautious stance toward AI editing
nodes.grounding_span: I will often have to double check their work to make sure they didn't do anything unnatural

nodes.label: Negative stance toward AI replacement in voice acting
nodes.grounding_span: I do indeed have major concerns about AI's presence in the voice acting industry

nodes.label: Hopeful stance toward AI as supplement
nodes.grounding_span: Ideally, I would hope that AI voices can be used for proof of concepts, ideation and help with the more technical aspects

nodes.label: Boundary-setting — clear delineation of AI vs human roles
nodes.grounding_span: I will not use AI much during the middle of the recording process

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — double-checks AI outputs
nodes.grounding_span: I will often have to double check their work
